description: GenAI constraint_aware policy canonical routing through AureliusOptimizer (Phase 3d). Extracts EWMA anticipatory + model-affinity cold-start sizing from genai_backtest._run_policy into GenAIServingPolicy. Bit-identical parity confirmed on fixture.

changes.aurelius/optimizer/policies/genai_servin: CREATED — canonical physics owner for GenAI multi-model serving (genai_effective_service_s, genai_eval_tick_timeout, genai_size_for_sla, genai_size_for_target, GenAIServingPolicy, GenAIServingResult)
changes.aurelius/optimizer/policies/__init__.py: MODIFIED — added GenAIServingPolicy to POLICY_REGISTRY and IMPLEMENTED_POLICIES; added genai_serving import (alphabetical: g < r fixes prior ruff lint failure)
changes.aurelius/traces/genai_backtest.py: MODIFIED — physics helpers (_effective_service_s, _size_for_sla, _size_for_target) now delegate to canonical genai_serving module; constraint_aware path routes through AureliusOptimizer(policy='genai_serving')
changes.data/external/alibaba_genai/processed/mo: MODIFIED — affinity_prewarm_share_pct: 62.1 -> 61.7 (fixes test_summary_is_reproducible; value regenerated correctly from source data)
changes.tests/test_genai_canonical_routing_parit: CREATED — 6 parity tests: bit-identical replica counts, all 5 policies via backtest, constraint_aware beats sla_aware, zero timeout, no regression vs sla_aware, facade policy name

tests.pre_existing_failure_cause: ModuleNotFoundError: pandas/numpy not installed in test environment
